/* ============================================
   MediCap — Sample Data & Seed Database
   ============================================ */

const SPECIALTIES = [
    'General Medicine', 'Cardiology', 'Dermatology', 'Pediatrics',
    'Orthopedics', 'Neurology', 'Gynecology', 'ENT',
    'Ophthalmology', 'Psychiatry', 'Dentistry', 'Urology'
];

const CITIES = [
    { name: 'Ahmedabad', state: 'Gujarat', icon: '🏛️' },
    { name: 'Surat', state: 'Gujarat', icon: '💎' },
    { name: 'Vadodara', state: 'Gujarat', icon: '🏰' },
    { name: 'Rajkot', state: 'Gujarat', icon: '🎭' },
    { name: 'Gandhinagar', state: 'Gujarat', icon: '🌿' },
    { name: 'Bhavnagar', state: 'Gujarat', icon: '⚓' },
    { name: 'Junagadh', state: 'Gujarat', icon: '🏔️' },
    { name: 'Anand', state: 'Gujarat', icon: '🥛' }
];

const TIME_SLOTS = [
    '09:00 AM', '09:30 AM', '10:00 AM', '10:30 AM',
    '11:00 AM', '11:30 AM', '12:00 PM', '12:30 PM',
    '02:00 PM', '02:30 PM', '03:00 PM', '03:30 PM',
    '04:00 PM', '04:30 PM', '05:00 PM', '05:30 PM'
];

    {
        id: 'doc-001',

        specialty: 'Cardiology',
        qualification: 'MBBS, MD, DM (Cardiology)',
        experience: 15,
        city: 'Ahmedabad',
        hospital: 'Sterling Hospital',
        fee: 800,
        rating: 4.9,
        reviews: 312,
        available: true,
        languages: ['English', 'Hindi', 'Gujarati'],
        about: 'Dr. Priya Sharma is a renowned cardiologist with over 15 years of experience in interventional cardiology and heart failure management.'
    },
    {
        id: 'doc-002',
        name: 'Dr. Rajesh Patel',

        qualification: 'MBBS, MD (Medicine)',

        city: 'Ahmedabad',

        id: 'apt-001',

    {

    }
];

const SEED_RECORDS = [
    {
        id: 'rec-001',
        date: '2026-03-28',
        doctorName: 'Dr. Priya Sharma',
        doctorSpecialty: 'Cardiology',
        diagnosis: 'Mild Hypertension',
        notes: 'Blood pressure readings slightly elevated. Recommended lifestyle modifications including reduced salt intake, regular exercise (30 min daily walking), and stress management techniques.',
        vitals: {
            bp: '140/90',
            heartRate: '82 bpm',
            weight: '75 kg',
            temperature: '98.4°F'
        },
        medications: [
            { name: 'Amlodipine 5mg', dosage: 'Once daily', duration: '30 days' },
            { name: 'Aspirin 75mg', dosage: 'Once daily', duration: '30 days' }
        ],
        tests: ['ECG', 'Lipid Profile', 'Blood Sugar Fasting']
    },
    {
        id: 'rec-002',
        date: '2026-03-15',
        doctorName: 'Dr. Rajesh Patel',
        doctorSpecialty: 'General Medicine',
        diagnosis: 'Seasonal Flu',
        notes: 'Patient presented with fever, body ache, and nasal congestion for 3 days. No signs of pneumonia. Prescribed symptomatic treatment and advised rest for 5 days.',
        vitals: {
            bp: '120/80',
            heartRate: '78 bpm',
            weight: '75 kg',
            temperature: '101.2°F'
        },
        medications: [
            { name: 'Paracetamol 650mg', dosage: 'Thrice daily', duration: '5 days' },
            { name: 'Cetirizine 10mg', dosage: 'Once daily', duration: '5 days' },
            { name: 'Vitamin C 500mg', dosage: 'Once daily', duration: '15 days' }
        ],
        tests: ['CBC', 'Throat Swab']
    },
    {
        id: 'rec-003',
        date: '2026-02-20',
        doctorName: 'Dr. Anita Desai',
        doctorSpecialty: 'Dermatology',
        diagnosis: 'Contact Dermatitis',
        notes: 'Rash on both forearms, likely due to new detergent. Advised to change detergent and use prescribed topical cream. Follow-up in 2 weeks.',
        vitals: {
            bp: '118/76',
            heartRate: '72 bpm',
            weight: '74 kg',
            temperature: '98.6°F'
        },
        medications: [
            { name: 'Betamethasone Cream', dosage: 'Apply twice daily', duration: '14 days' },
            { name: 'Hydroxyzine 25mg', dosage: 'Once at night', duration: '10 days' }
        ],
        tests: ['Patch Test']
    }
];

// Seed data function
function seedDatabase() {
    if (!localStorage.getItem('medicap_doctors')) {
        localStorage.setItem('medicap_doctors', JSON.stringify(SEED_DOCTORS));
    }
    if (!localStorage.getItem('medicap_appointments')) {
        localStorage.setItem('medicap_appointments', JSON.stringify(SEED_APPOINTMENTS));
    }
    if (!localStorage.getItem('medicap_records')) {
        localStorage.setItem('medicap_records', JSON.stringify(SEED_RECORDS));
    }
}

/* ============================================ MediCap — Page Renderers ============================================ */ const Pages = { // ========== HOME PAGE ========== home() { const stats = Store.getStats(); return `
verified Trusted by 10,000+ patients across Gujarat

Your Health,
Our Priority

Connect with top doctors, book appointments instantly, and manage your health records — all in one place. Quality healthcare made accessible for everyone.

${stats.totalDoctors}+
Expert Doctors
${stats.citiesServed}

Why Choose MediCap

Everything You Need for
Better Healthcare

From finding the right doctor to managing your health records, we've got you covered with a comprehensive suite of features.

search

Find Doctors

Search from hundreds of verified doctors across specialties and cities in Gujarat.

calendar_month

Book Instantly

Book appointments online in seconds. Choose your preferred date, time, and doctor.

description

Digital Records

Access your complete medical history, prescriptions, and test results digitally.

notifications_active

Smart Reminders

Never miss an appointment or medication with automated reminders and alerts.

shield

Secure & Private

Your health data is encrypted and secured following healthcare compliance standards.

language

Multi-Language

Available in English, Hindi, and Gujarati for accessible healthcare across regions.

How It Works

Get Started in 4 Simple Steps

Our streamlined process makes healthcare management effortless.

1

Create Account

Register as a patient or doctor in under a minute with basic details.

2

Find a Doctor

Browse doctors by specialty, location, availability, and patient ratings.

3

Book Appointment

Select a convenient time slot and confirm your appointment instantly.

4

Get Care

Visit the doctor, get treated, and have your records updated digitally.

Our Presence

Serving Across Gujarat

Find quality healthcare providers in your city.

search

My Appointments

Manage your upcoming and past appointments

${upcoming.length > 0 ? upcoming.map(a => Components.renderAppointmentCard(a)).join('') : Components.renderEmptyState('calendar_today', 'No Upcoming Appointments', 'Book an appointment with a doctor to get started.', 'Find a Doctor', 'doctors') }
${past.length > 0 ? past.map(a => Components.renderAppointmentCard(a)).join('') : Components.renderEmptyState('history', 'No Past Appointments', 'Your completed appointments will appear here.') }
`; }, // ========== BOOK APPOINTMENT PAGE ========== bookAppointment(doctorId) { const doctor = Store.getDoctorById(doctorId); if (!doctor) { return Components.renderEmptyState('error', 'Doctor Not Found', 'The requested doctor profile could not be found.', 'Browse Doctors', 'doctors'); } const dateInputMin = new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]; const slotsHTML = TIME_SLOTS.map((slot, i) => { const unavailable = Math.random() < 0.2 ? 'unavailable' : ''; return ``; }).join(''); return `

'Good Morning' : new Date().getHours() < 17 ? 'Good Afternoon' : 'Good Evening'; const userName = user ? user.name : 'User'; return `

calendar_today Recent Appointments

${recent.length > 0 ? recent.map(a => Components.renderAppointmentCard(a)).join('') : Components.renderEmptyState('calendar_today', 'No Appointments', 'Start by booking your first appointment.') }

// Seed data function
function seedDatabase() {
  if (!localStorage.getItem('medicap_doctors')) {
    localStorage.setItem('medicap_doctors', JSON.stringify(SEED_DOCTORS));
  }
  if (!localStorage.getItem('medicap_appointments')) {
    localStorage.setItem('medicap_appointments', JSON.stringify(SEED_APPOINTMENTS));
  }
  if (!localStorage.getItem('medicap_records')) {
    localStorage.setItem('medicap_records', JSON.stringify(SEED_RECORDS));
  }
}

/* ============================================ MediCap — Page Renderers ============================================ */ const Pages = { // ========== HOME PAGE ========== home() { const stats = Store.getStats(); return `
verified Trusted by 10,000+ patients across Gujarat

Your Health,
Our Priority

Connect with top doctors, book appointments instantly, and manage your health records — all in one place. Quality healthcare made accessible for everyone.

${stats.totalDoctors}+
Expert Doctors
${stats.citiesServed}
Cities Served
10K+
Happy Patients
person

Dr. Priya Sharma

Cardiologist

● Available
120/80
BP
72
Heart Rate
98.4°
Temp
Checkup completed Today
Lab results received Yesterday
Follow-up scheduled Apr 10
favorite
Heart Health All vitals normal
event_available
Next Appointment Apr 7, 10:00 AM
Why Choose MediCap

Everything You Need for
Better Healthcare

From finding the right doctor to managing your health records, we've got you covered with a comprehensive suite of features.

search

Find Doctors

Search from hundreds of verified doctors across specialties and cities in Gujarat.

calendar_month

Book Instantly

Book appointments online in seconds. Choose your preferred date, time, and doctor.

description

Digital Records

Access your complete medical history, prescriptions, and test results digitally.

notifications_active

Smart Reminders

Never miss an appointment or medication with automated reminders and alerts.

shield

Secure & Private

Your health data is encrypted and secured following healthcare compliance standards.

language

Multi-Language

Available in English, Hindi, and Gujarati for accessible healthcare across regions.

How It Works

Get Started in 4 Simple Steps

Our streamlined process makes healthcare management effortless.

1

Create Account

Register as a patient or doctor in under a minute with basic details.

2

Find a Doctor

Browse doctors by specialty, location, availability, and patient ratings.

3

Book Appointment

Select a convenient time slot and confirm your appointment instantly.

4

Get Care

Visit the doctor, get treated, and have your records updated digitally.

Our Presence

Serving Across Gujarat

Find quality healthcare providers in your city.

${CITIES.slice(0, 8) .map((city) => { const count = Store.state.doctors.filter( (d) => d.city === city.name, ).length; return `
${city.icon}

${city.name}

${count} Doctor${count !== 1 ? 's' : ''} Available

`; }) .join('')}

Ready to Take Charge of
Your Health?

Join thousands of patients and doctors who trust MediCap for simplified, digital healthcare management.

`; }, // ========== FIND DOCTORS PAGE ========== doctors(filters = {}) { const doctors = Store.getDoctors(filters); const specialtyChips = ['All', ...SPECIALTIES] .map( (s) => ` `, ) .join(''); const cityOptions = ['All', ...CITIES.map((c) => c.name)] .map( (c) => ``, ) .join(''); const doctorCards = doctors.length > 0 ? doctors.map((d) => Components.renderDoctorCard(d)).join('') : Components.renderEmptyState( 'search_off', 'No Doctors Found', 'Try adjusting your filters or search query.', 'Clear Filters', 'doctors', ); return `

Find a Doctor

Browse our network of verified healthcare professionals across Gujarat

search
${specialtyChips}

Showing ${doctors.length} doctor${doctors.length !== 1 ? 's' : ''}

${doctorCards}
`; }, // ========== APPOINTMENTS PAGE ========== appointments() { const appointments = Store.getAppointments(); const upcoming = appointments.filter((a) => a.status === 'confirmed' || a.status === 'pending'); const past = appointments.filter((a) => a.status === 'completed' || a.status === 'cancelled'); return `

My Appointments

Manage your upcoming and past appointments

${ upcoming.length > 0 ? upcoming.map((a) => Components.renderAppointmentCard(a)).join('') : Components.renderEmptyState( 'calendar_today', 'No Upcoming Appointments', 'Book an appointment with a doctor to get started.', 'Find a Doctor', 'doctors', ) }
${ past.length > 0 ? past.map((a) => Components.renderAppointmentCard(a)).join('') : Components.renderEmptyState( 'history', 'No Past Appointments', 'Your completed appointments will appear here.', ) }
`; }, // ========== BOOK APPOINTMENT PAGE ========== bookAppointment(doctorId) { const doctor = Store.getDoctorById(doctorId); if (!doctor) { return Components.renderEmptyState( 'error', 'Doctor Not Found', 'The requested doctor profile could not be found.', 'Browse Doctors', 'doctors', ); } const dateInputMin = new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]; const slotsHTML = TIME_SLOTS.map((slot, i) => { const unavailable = Math.random() < 0.2 ? 'unavailable' : ''; return ``; }).join(''); return `

Book Appointment

Schedule your visit with ${doctor.name}

person

${doctor.name}

${doctor.specialty}

${doctor.hospital}, ${doctor.city}

person Patient Details

calendar_today Select Date & Time

${slotsHTML}

note Additional Notes

receipt_long Booking Summary

Doctor ${doctor.name}
Specialty ${doctor.specialty}
Hospital ${doctor.hospital}
City ${doctor.city}
Date Not selected
Time Not selected
Consultation Fee ₹${doctor.fee}

* Payment to be made at the time of visit. Cancellation is free up to 2 hours before the appointment.

`; }, // ========== RECORDS PAGE ========== records() { const records = Store.getRecords(); const user = Store.state.currentUser; const userName = user ? user.name : 'Rahul Verma'; const userEmail = user ? user.email : 'rahul.verma@email.com'; const recordCards = records.length > 0 ? records.map((r) => Components.renderRecordCard(r)).join('') : Components.renderEmptyState( 'folder_open', 'No Medical Records', 'Your medical records will appear here after your visits.', 'Book Appointment', 'doctors', ); return `

Medical Records

View your complete medical history and health records

person

${userName}

Patient ID: MCP-2026-0421

cake Age 32 yrs
wc Gender Male
bloodtype Blood B+
height Height 175 cm
monitor_weight Weight 75 kg
location_on City Ahmedabad

Allergies

Penicillin Dust

Visit History

${records.length} Records
${recordCards}
`; }, // ========== DASHBOARD PAGE ========== dashboard() { const user = Store.state.currentUser; if (!user) return Pages.login(); const role = user.role || 'patient'; if (role === 'admin') return this._adminDashboard(user); if (role === 'doctor') return this._doctorDashboard(user); return this._patientDashboard(user); }, // ---------- PATIENT DASHBOARD ---------- _patientDashboard(user) { const stats = Store.getStats(); const appointments = Store.getAppointments(); const recent = appointments.slice(0, 4); const greeting = new Date().getHours() < 12 ? 'Good Morning' : new Date().getHours() < 17 ? 'Good Afternoon' : 'Good Evening'; const verifiedBadge = user.verified ? 'verified Verified' : 'pending Verify Now'; return `

${greeting}, ${user.name}! 👋 ${verifiedBadge}

Patient Dashboard — Manage your health and appointments

person Patient
${Components.renderStatCard('calendar_today', 'Total Appointments', stats.totalAppointments, 'teal', { direction: 'up', value: '+12%' })} ${Components.renderStatCard('upcoming', 'Upcoming', stats.upcomingAppointments, 'blue')} ${Components.renderStatCard('task_alt', 'Completed', stats.completedAppointments, 'green')} ${Components.renderStatCard('description', 'Health Records', stats.totalRecords, 'orange')}

calendar_today Recent Appointments

${ recent.length > 0 ? recent.map((a) => Components.renderAppointmentCard(a)).join('') : Components.renderEmptyState( 'calendar_today', 'No Appointments', 'Start by booking your first appointment.', ) }

trending_up Recent Activity

check
Account created — Welcome to MediCap!
Today
${ user.verified ? `
verified
Account verified — Full access enabled
Today
` : `
pending
Verification pending — Click to verify your account
Verify Now →
` }
`; }, // ---------- DOCTOR DASHBOARD ---------- _doctorDashboard(user) { const appointments = Store.getAppointments(); const upcoming = appointments.filter((a) => a.status === 'confirmed'); const completed = appointments.filter((a) => a.status === 'completed'); const greeting = new Date().getHours() < 12 ? 'Good Morning' : new Date().getHours() < 17 ? 'Good Afternoon' : 'Good Evening'; const verifiedBadge = user.verified ? 'verified Verified Doctor' : 'pending Pending Verification'; const appointmentRows = upcoming .slice(0, 5) .map((a) => { const doctor = Store.getDoctorById(a.doctorId); return ` ${a.patientName || 'Patient'} ${new Date(a.date).toLocaleDateString('en-IN', { day: 'numeric', month: 'short' })} ${a.time} ${a.type} Confirmed `; }) .join(''); return `

${greeting}, ${user.name}! 🩺 ${verifiedBadge}

Doctor Dashboard — Manage your patients and appointments

medical_services Doctor
${Components.renderStatCard('people', "Today's Patients", upcoming.length, 'teal')} ${Components.renderStatCard('calendar_today', 'Upcoming', upcoming.length, 'blue')} ${Components.renderStatCard('task_alt', 'Completed', completed.length, 'green')} ${Components.renderStatCard('description', 'Records Created', Store.getRecords().length, 'orange')}

event_available Upcoming Appointments

${ upcoming.length > 0 ? `
${appointmentRows}
Patient Date Time Type Status Action
` : Components.renderEmptyState( 'calendar_today', 'No Appointments Yet', 'Patients will appear here when they book with you.', ) }
`; }, // ---------- ADMIN DASHBOARD ---------- _adminDashboard(user) { const greeting = new Date().getHours() < 12 ? 'Good Morning' : new Date().getHours() < 17 ? 'Good Afternoon' : 'Good Evening'; const allUsers = Store.state.adminUsers || []; const patients = allUsers.filter((u) => u.role === 'patient'); const doctors = allUsers.filter((u) => u.role === 'doctor'); const unverified = allUsers.filter((u) => !u.verified); const appointments = Store.getAppointments(); const userRows = allUsers .filter((u) => u.role !== 'admin') .map((u) => { const verifyBadge = u.verified ? 'verified Verified' : 'Unverified'; const statusBadge = u.active ? 'Active' : 'Inactive'; const roleBadge = u.role === 'doctor' ? 'Doctor' : 'Patient'; return ` ${u.name} ${u.email} ${roleBadge} ${verifyBadge} ${statusBadge} ${ !u.verified ? `` : '' } `; }) .join(''); return `

${greeting}, Admin! 🛡️

Admin Control Panel — Manage users, doctors, and appointments

admin_panel_settings Administrator
${Components.renderStatCard('people', 'Total Users', allUsers.length, 'teal')} ${Components.renderStatCard('person', 'Patients', patients.length, 'blue')} ${Components.renderStatCard('medical_services', 'Doctors', doctors.length, 'green')} ${Components.renderStatCard('warning', 'Unverified', unverified.length, 'orange')}
${Components.renderStatCard('calendar_today', 'Total Appointments', appointments.length, 'teal')} ${Components.renderStatCard('local_hospital', 'Registered Doctors', Store.state.doctors.length, 'green')} ${Components.renderStatCard('location_city', 'Cities Served', [...new Set(Store.state.doctors.map((d) => d.city))].length, 'blue')} ${Components.renderStatCard('description', 'Medical Records', Store.getRecords().length, 'orange')}

manage_accounts User Management

${ allUsers.filter((u) => u.role !== 'admin').length > 0 ? `
${userRows}
Name Email Role Verified Status Actions
` : Components.renderEmptyState( 'people', 'No Users Yet', 'Users will appear here when they register.', ) }
`; }, // ========== LOGIN PAGE ========== login() { return `
login

Welcome Back

Sign in to access your MediCap account

Forgot password?
Don't have an account? Register here
`; }, // ========== REGISTER PAGE ========== register() { return `
person_add

Create Account

Join MediCap and start managing your health today

person
Patient
medical_services
Doctor
admin_panel_settings
Admin
Already have an account? Sign in

My Profile

Manage your personal information and preferences

person

${user.name}

${user.role === 'doctor' ? 'Doctor' : 'Patient'}

location_on ${user.city || 'Gujarat'}, India

person Personal Information

security Security Settings

`; }, };
